name: postgres-mcp
description: Tool catalog for the Postgres MCP server. Classifies common Postgres MCP tools by their governance risk.

riskLevels.READ: Read-only metadata or query inspection with no database side effects.
riskLevels.MUTATING: Changes database state or session behavior but is not inherently destructive.
riskLevels.DESTRUCTIVE: Can execute arbitrary SQL or perform high-impact database operations.

tools.name: list_tables
tools.description: Lists tables available to the connected Postgres role.

tools.name: list_schemas
tools.description: Lists database schemas available to the connected Postgres role.

tools.name: describe_table
tools.description: Returns columns, indexes, constraints, and metadata for a table.

tools.name: get_table_schema
tools.description: Returns schema details for a specific table.

tools.name: list_columns
tools.description: Lists columns for a table or view.

tools.name: list_indexes
tools.description: Lists indexes defined on a table.

tools.name: list_constraints
tools.description: Lists primary key, foreign key, unique, and check constraints.

tools.name: explain_query
tools.description: Returns a query execution plan without modifying data.

tools.name: execute_sql
tools.description: Executes raw SQL against Postgres. Governed by argument-level SQL regex rules in policy.yaml.
